nasb.text: Now therefore why do you put God to the test by placing upon the neck of the disciples a yoke which neither our fathers nor we have been able to bear?

esv.text: Now, therefore, why are you putting God to the test by placing a yoke on the neck of the disciples that neither our fathers nor we have been able to bear?

cnv.text: 現在你們為甚麼試探　神，把我們祖先和我們所不能負的軛，放在門徒的頸上呢？

ccb.text: 现在你们为什么要试探上帝，把我们祖先和我们不能负的重担强加在这些门徒身上？

csbs.text: 既然如此，你们现在为什么试探神，把我们的祖先和我们都担当不了的轭，放在那些门徒的脖子上呢？
